description: Address 7 issues from semantic review: bot security, backup error handling, export/import asymmetry, outbound dead code, cmdNodes subquery, webhook validation, hardcoded placeholders
steps: 1. Fix bot.go: Add isAdmin guard to user: callback prefix handler
2. Fix api.go backupImport: Track row insertion failures and return counts in response
3. Fix api.go backupImport: Add import handlers for nodes and vpn_configs tables
4. Wire outbound functions: Call parseOutboundConfig and apply functions from node agent protocol setup
5. Fix cmdNodes: Remove wasteful per-node global online count subquery
6. Fix warnings.go putWarningConfig: Add webhook URL validation (scheme + host)
7. Fix hardcoded placeholders: Replace with t() calls in CustomerDetailView.vue and NodesView.vue, add i18n keys
acceptance_criteria: user: callback in bot is guarded by isAdmin check
backupImport reports row failure counts in JSON response
nodes and vpn_configs are imported during backup restore
Outbound functions are called from node agent when extra_json has outbound config
cmdNodes does not run a wasteful subquery for global online count
putWarningConfig validates webhook URL scheme and host
No remaining hardcoded English placeholder strings (Password, Display name, Plan default, UUID or password) in CustomerDetailView.vue or NodesView.vue
All builds pass (go build, go test, vue-tsc)
findings: All 7 review issues addressed. Go build, go test, vue-tsc, and vite build all pass for panel, node, and admin frontend. The outbound dead code was wired via a new vpn.apply_outbound task action (backward compatible - existing nodes without outbound config are unaffected). Port type fixed from string to int in bridge config for xray-core/sing-box compatibility.
